youtube_transcript.description: Fetch YouTube video transcript from a URL

webfetch.description: Fetch a web page and convert to clean markdown

yt_summary.description: Fetch a YouTube video transcript and create a concise, timestamped summary highlighting key points.

yt_wisdom.description: Fetch a YouTube video transcript and extract surprising, insightful information on human flourishing, AI, learning, and more.

yt_wisdom_agents.description: Fetch a YouTube video transcript and extract valuable insights, ideas, quotes, and references from the content.

yt_activities.description: Fetch a YouTube video transcript and extract key events and activities, providing a summary of what happened.

yt_patterns.description: Fetch a YouTube video transcript and extract recurring, surprising, and insightful patterns with analysis and advice.

yt_article_wisdom.description: Fetch a YouTube video transcript and extract structured wisdom: summary, ideas, quotes, facts, references, and recommendations.

yt_recommendations.description: Fetch a YouTube video transcript and extract concise, actionable recommendations.

yt_flashcards.description: Fetch a YouTube video transcript, extract key wisdom, then generate Anki flashcards for spaced repetition learning.

yt_mermaid.description: Fetch a YouTube video transcript, summarize it, then visualize the structure as a Mermaid diagram.

web_summary.description: Fetch a web page and summarize it into a 20-word sentence, main points, and takeaways.
web_summary.inputDescription: URL of a web page or blog article

web_wisdom.description: Fetch a web page and extract surprising, insightful information on human flourishing, AI, learning, and more.
web_wisdom.inputDescription: URL of a web page or blog article

web_recommendations.description: Fetch a web page and extract concise, actionable recommendations.
web_recommendations.inputDescription: URL of a web page or blog article

web_instructions.description: Fetch a web page and extract clear, step-by-step instructions from tutorials and how-to guides.
web_instructions.inputDescription: URL of a tutorial, how-to guide, or documentation page

html_to_markdown.description: Convert HTML content to clean, properly formatted Markdown, preserving structure and formatting.

prd_to_stories.description: Turn a rough idea or requirements into a PRD, then break it into implementable user stories.
prd_to_stories.inputDescription: A rough feature idea, requirements description, or problem statement

prd_to_threat_model.description: Turn requirements into a PRD, then generate a STRIDE-based security threat model.
prd_to_threat_model.inputDescription: A feature idea, requirements description, or system description

design_and_review.description: Generate a C4-model design document, then immediately critique it for clarity, security, and scalability.
design_and_review.inputDescription: A system description, requirements, or feature specification

explain_and_glossary.description: Explain unfamiliar code, then generate a glossary of all technical terms with definitions and analogies.
explain_and_glossary.inputDescription: Code, configuration, or technical text to understand

diff_to_commit.description: Analyze a git diff and generate proper git commands with conventional commit messages.
diff_to_commit.inputDescription: Git diff output (from git diff, git diff --staged, etc.)

diff_to_pr.description: Analyze a git diff, summarize changes, then draft a detailed pull request description.
diff_to_pr.inputDescription: Git diff output (from git diff, git diff --staged, etc.)

diff_to_review.description: Summarize a git diff, then perform a code review with feedback on correctness, security, and performance.
diff_to_review.inputDescription: Git diff output (from git diff, git diff --staged, etc.)

yt_instructions.description: Fetch a YouTube video transcript and extract clear, step-by-step instructions from technical tutorials and how-to videos.

code_and_review.description: Generate a code feature from a specification, then immediately review it for correctness, security, and performance.
code_and_review.inputDescription: A feature specification or project description (ideally with code2context JSON)
